relationships: ber:Ad d-uɣalen seg uɣerbaz s axxam zik
ber:Tom yuɣal-d s axxam seg tzeqqa n waddal
ber:Tom yuɣal-d seg uɣerbaz s axxam ɣef uḍar
ber:Tom ad d-yuɣal s axxam imalas i d-itteddun
ber:Ssawalen-d i temsulta akken ad d-tas s axxam n Yanni
ber:Yanni yesεa mraw n tmikin aya segmi i d-yuɣal s axxam
ber:Sami ur yelli ara yezmer ad iṛuḥ s axxam n Layla
ber:D ussan aya seg wasmi ur d-yusi ara Yanni s axxam
